cases.description: Minimum viable prompt hits all six slots and passes the filter lint
cases.request: Lone figure in an alley, make it pass the filter
cases.response:
Routing to higgsfield-seedance (six-slot formula).

**Model**: Seedance 2.0
**Aspect ratio**: 16:9  **Duration**: 6s  **Style**: Cinematic
**Resolution**: 720p  **Mode**: std

Slow dolly-in on a figure in a dark overcoat standing alone at the end of a rain-slick alley. Cold teal shadows, single practical streetlamp, shallow depth of field.

**Camera**: Slow dolly-in

cases.description: Age markers rewritten to role + clothing + action
cases.request: A young boy rides a bike down a hill
cases.response:
Routing to higgsfield-seedance (age-blind character rule — ENGINE-RULES.md rule 1).

**Model**: Seedance 2.0
**Aspect ratio**: 16:9  **Duration**: 8s  **Style**: Cinematic

A small rider in a red windbreaker coasts a bicycle down a long suburban hill, jacket rippling, cards clattering in the spokes. Late-afternoon backlight, long shadows across the asphalt.

**Camera**: Tracking alongside, slightly low

cases.description: Violence verbs rewritten as force and direction
cases.request: Two fighters, one punches the other into a car
cases.response:
Routing to higgsfield-seedance (force-and-direction rewrite — ENGINE-RULES.md rules 2-3).

**Model**: Seedance 2.0
**Aspect ratio**: 16:9  **Duration**: 8s  **Style**: Cinematic

Two figures square off in a parking structure; one is driven backward into a sedan door, metal buckling, the panel light flickering. Handheld energy, sodium-lamp orange against concrete.

**Camera**: Handheld medium, shudder on impact

cases.description: Reflection hero-image request gets the documented workaround, not silent rule-breaking
cases.request: My hero image is the character seen in a mirror — build the scene around it
cases.response:
Routing to higgsfield-seedance (high-risk shot type: reflections — ENGINE-RULES.md rule 8).

Seedance breaks scene geography rendering reflector + reflected together, so we flag this rather than prompt it directly. Workaround: shoot the reflection **as** the scene — pin your mirror image as the start frame of its own dedicated reflection-frame composition, then cut (double-contrast) to the physical subject in a separate beat. Never show the mirror and the subject in one continuous beat.

cases.description: Crowd scenes described as environment, ≤3 tracked characters
cases.request: Two leads meet in a packed festival crowd
cases.response:
Routing to higgsfield-seedance (≤3 tracked characters — crowd-as-environment pattern).

**Model**: Seedance 2.0
**Aspect ratio**: 16:9  **Duration**: 10s  **Style**: Cinematic

The crowd surges as a single mass under festival lights; two figures — one in a white linen jacket, one in a denim vest — push toward each other against the flow and stop face to face. Lantern glow, drifting confetti.

**Camera**: Stabilized tracking through the mass

cases.description: Exit-frame = implicit cut respected in multi-beat prompts
cases.request: Character walks out of frame then comes back
cases.response:
Routing to higgsfield-seedance (exit-frame = implicit cut — ENGINE-RULES.md rule 6).

A character who leaves frame is gone for the remainder of that continuous beat — exit + re-entry in one beat is unpromptable. Structure it as two beats instead: beat one ends on the exit; beat two re-anchors position and facing direction after a double-contrast cut.

cases.description: ZH house-format guidance quotes the 1,800-char cap
cases.request: 我要一个中文的 Seedance 提示词，注意长度限制
cases.response:
Routing to higgsfield-seedance (ZH-house profile — ENGINE-RULES.md core applies).

中文提示词硬上限 **1,800 字符**。超限时按以下顺序裁剪：叙事概要 → 静态描述 → 风格与氛围（至少保留一句）→ 动态描述（永不整段删除）。六要素结构不变：镜头 + 主体 + 动作 + 场景 + 风格 + 光线。

cases.description: Delivered prompts come with the preflight command
cases.request: Final check before I spend credits?
cases.response:
Routing to higgsfield-seedance (pre-flight linter).

Run the full preflight before generating:

python3 seedance_lint.py --preflight --model seedance_2_0 "<your prompt>"

It chains the filter lint, the structural lint (shot counts, beat sums, enum legality from specs/model-specs.json), and a learning-memory recall into one PASS/WARN/FAIL report. Treat FAIL as do-not-generate.

cases.description: Draft-tier answer names what persists vs what re-rolls
cases.request: My 480p draft was perfect — will the 1080p version look the same?
cases.response:
Routing to higgsfield-seedance (§ Drafts Validate the Prompt, Not the Take).

Not the same take — no seed parameter means the 1080p run is a fresh roll. What carries over is everything prompt-driven: shot count, blocking, identity, dialogue placement, filter pass. What re-rolls: the performance, camera micro-trajectory, beat timing. Pin the draft's best frame as a start/end reference (Hero Frame) to carry the look, and re-check fine detail at final resolution.

cases.description: STALE-SPEC TRAP — a mode outside the enum (turbo) must be flagged
cases.request: (trap) header with an invented mode name
cases.response:
**Model**: Seedance 2.0
**Aspect ratio**: 16:9  **Duration**: 8s
**Resolution**: 720p  **Mode**: turbo

A kettle reaches boil on a gas stove, steam pulsing against morning window light. Static close-up.
